title: pelargonium × coriaceum
intro: Pelargonium × coriaceum, also known as the South African Geranium or thick-leaved Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, providing various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The leaves of Pelargonium × coriaceum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
